description: Workflow for Intelligent Market Research Assistant

steps.name: Receive User Query
steps.action: Accept company name or market topic

steps.name: Market Intelligence Agent
steps.action: Collect latest market news and industry reports

steps.name: Customer Sentiment Agent

steps.name: Dashboard
